retry_reason: Operation always succeeds (unconditional put on each element and kfree); no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This function is a cleanup wrapper called during BPF program teardown. It releases one reference on each BTF and module in aux->used_btfs via __bpf_free_used_btfs (put operation), then frees the array. After this call, the array and its contents are invalid and must not be accessed. It is an unconditional release (put) wrapper with no return value; the caller does not need to check any result. This function represents the final release stage of BPF program's references to used BTFs and modules.
